# N2 Adsorption

**Summary**: A method to measure specific surface area and pore size distribution using nitrogen gas.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022]] applied N2 adsorption analysis to determine the volume of pores larger than 2 nm in carbonate mudrocks.

## Key Results and Findings

- LFH3 had a higher adsorption capacity (44 cm3/g) compared to LFH1 (31 cm3/g) and LFH2 (29 cm3/g). ([[2022-abdlmutalib|Abdlmutalib, 2022, p. 131]])
